description:
Latest image model from Ideogram, with industry leading capabilities in generating realistic images, graphic design, typography, and more.

Optional parameters:
Set aspect ratio. Select from (10:16, 16:10, 9:16, 16:9, 3:2, 2:3, 4:3, 3:4, 1:1). It is set to 1:1 aspect ratio as default.
Set style. Select from General, Realistic, Design, Render 3D, Anime. This is set to General by default.

Notes: Supported file type: JPEG, WebP and PNG. Powered by Ideogram.
